executive_verdict.most_urgent_fix: Marketing owner loop must produce a fresh independent verification with measurable primary-repo adoption evidence.

findings.title: Marketing independent verification remains stale (age ~2928 min), fails closed
findings.mechanism: Marketing independent verification artifact is ~2928 minutes old against a 240-minute max-age threshold. Verdict is fail.
findings.root_cause: Primary-repo adoption measurement is pending; no fresh evidence produced by marketing owner loop.
findings.recommended_fix: Marketing owner loop must produce fresh measurable primary-repo adoption evidence and rerun marketing independent verification.

findings.title: Live Gateway topology is clean: 21 enabled, 0 disabled, 3 running, 3 last-error
findings.mechanism: Direct live cron inspection confirms full alignment. Three last-error jobs have documented causes unrelated to architecture ownership.

findings.title: Architecture verifier path green — checker OK, verifier OK, independent verify qualified_pass
findings.mechanism: agent_architecture_checker → AGENT_ARCHITECTURE_OK. Verifier → ok (0 errors). Independent verify → qualified_pass (errors only on stale external marketing).

findings.title: Loop pypi-auto-unblocker has NO self-improvement mandate
findings.mechanism: Not registered in self_improvement_loops.json. When outcomes are flat this loop will repeat same tactics forever.

findings.title: Loop internal-linking-watchdog has NO self-improvement mandate + Matrix delivery config error
findings.mechanism: Not registered in self_improvement_loops.json. Last error: Delivering to Matrix requires target <room|alias|user>.

findings.title: Self-improvement registry sparse — only 2 of 21 loops registered
findings.mechanism: self_improvement_loops.json contains only ralph-docs-watchdog and agent-architecture-watchdog. 19 active loops unregistered.

findings.mechanism: Ralph docs verifier confirms pass on all criteria.
